summary: Tested payment flow and Step 2 UI fixes. Fixed critical bug in payment/create endpoint - was looking in wrong MongoDB collection (memberships instead of membership_orders) and wrong field name (id instead of order_id). Also fixed getApiUrl function to accept path parameter. All requested features now working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: membership_routes.py payment/create endpoint was looking in db.memberships instead of db.membership_orders
Fixed: membership_routes.py was using 'id' field instead of 'order_id' field
Fixed: getApiUrl function in api.js was not accepting path parameter
Added: /api/membership/order/{order_id} endpoint to fetch order details for payment page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow is working with MOCKED Razorpay test keys (rzp_test_1234567890abcdef). The Razorpay modal appears but will fail with actual payment since keys are placeholders. All Step 2 UI elements verified: title 'About Your Pet', 'Upload Photo *' label, breed autocomplete with dark theme.

payment_flow.details: Full onboarding flow from /join to payment page works. No 'Failed to initiate payment' error. Payment/create and payment/verify endpoints working.

step2_upload_photo_label.details: 'Upload Photo *' label visible at top of Step 2

step2_breed_autocomplete.details: Breed autocomplete shows suggestions with dark theme (bg-slate-800)

api_payment_create.details: POST /api/membership/payment/create returns valid response with razorpay_order_id

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: payment/create endpoint was looking in wrong collection (memberships) and wrong field (id)
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed to look in membership_orders collection with order_id field, with fallback to memberships for backward compatibility
Added GET endpoint to fetch order details

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: getApiUrl function did not accept path parameter
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Updated function to accept optional path parameter and concatenate it

mocked_integrations.razorpay: Using test keys rzp_test_1234567890abcdef - payment modal appears but actual payment will fail
